title: Links, Images, References, Autolinks, and URL Safety
description: Nested brackets confuse destination parsing, unresolved references disappear, javascript URLs survive into output, duplicate labels change silently, and every image receives its filename as alt text. Learners cumulatively produce reference-aware accessible link and media model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Parse labels, destinations, optional titles, nesting, escaping, angle forms, and balanced delimiters under a named subset.
Normalize reference labels, detect duplicates, resolve forward references, preserve unresolved source, and report locations.
Classify relative, root-relative, fragment, mail, HTTP, data, and forbidden schemes before context-aware encoding.
